tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: Laboratory results are overall within normal limits, indicating good glycemic, renal, and lipid control. Mildly elevated potassium and slightly low total CO₂ may warrant monitoring for possible electrolyte imbalance or early metabolic acidosis, especially considering the patient’s age. No evidence of significant renal dysfunction or microalbuminuria. No acute concerns based on current data.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
